Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class NamedCredential

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.NamedCredential
public class NamedCredential extends Metadata

Java class for NamedCredential complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="NamedCredential">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="allowMergeFieldsInBody" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="allowMergeFieldsInHeader" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="authProvider" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="authTokenEndpointUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="awsAccessKey" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="awsAccessSecret" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="awsRegion" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="awsService" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="calloutStatus" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}CalloutStatus" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="certificate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="endpoint" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="generateAuthorizationHeader" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="jwtAudience" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="jwtFormulaSubject" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="jwtIssuer" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="jwtSigningCertificate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="jwtTextSubject" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="jwtValidityPeriodSeconds" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="label" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="namedCredentialParameters" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}NamedCredentialParameter" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="namedCredentialType" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}NamedCredentialType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="oauthRefreshToken" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="oauthScope" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="oauthToken" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="outboundNetworkConnection" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="password" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="principalType" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}ExternalPrincipalType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="protocol" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}AuthenticationProtocol" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="username" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

    • getNamedCredentialParameters

      public List<NamedCredentialParameter> getNamedCredentialParameters()
      Gets the value of the namedCredentialParameters property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the namedCredentialParameters property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getNamedCredentialParameters().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list NamedCredentialParameter

      Returns:
      The value of the namedCredentialParameters property.
